zh.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: 英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋
zh.Kyme, , , England: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir William Tailboys於大約1416年出生在英國時，他的父親Sir Walter Tailboys26歲，母親Lady Alice Stafford26歲。他於1446年11月之前與Elizabeth Bonville在英國結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他於1461年登記服兵役。他去世於1464年5月26日在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年49歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir William Tailboys于大约1416年出生在英国时，他的父亲Sir Walter Tailboys26岁，母亲Lady Alice Stafford26岁。他于1446年11月之前与Elizabeth Bonville在英国结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他于1461年登记服兵役。他去世于1464年5月26日在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋享年49岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋。

nameMeanings.name: Tailboys
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Talboys
meanings: Norman, English: locative name from Taillebois (Orne).

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir William Tailboys was born about 1416, in England, his father, Sir Walter Tailboys, was 26 and his mother, Lady Alice Stafford, was 26. He married Elizabeth Bonville before November 1446, in England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He registered for military service in 1461. He died on 26 May 1464, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, at the age of 49, and was buried in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir William Tailboys est né environ 1416, à Angleterre, son père, Sir Walter Tailboys, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Alice Stafford, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Bonville avant novembre 1446, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1461. Il est décédé le 26 mai 1464, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans, et a été enterré à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir William Tailboys um 1416 in England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Walter Tailboys 26 und seine Mutter Lady Alice Stafford 26. Er hat vor November 1446 in England Elizabeth Bonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er hat sich 1461 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 26. Mai 1464 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England und wurde in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tailboys è nato il circa 1416 nel England, il suo padre, Sir Walter Tailboys, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Alice Stafford, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Bonville prima del novembre 1446, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1461. Morì il 26 maggio 1464, nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, all'età di 49 anni, e fu sepolto a Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir William Tailboysが約1416年にイギリスで生まれた時，父Sir Walter Tailboysは26歳，母Lady Alice Staffordは26歳であった。1446年11月以前にイギリスでElizabeth Bonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1461年に兵役登録をした。彼は1464年5月26日にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで49歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir William Tailboys(이)가 대략 1416년 영국에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Walter Tailboys(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Alice Stafford(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1446년 11월 이전 영국에서 Elizabeth Bonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1461년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1464년 5월 26일 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 49세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir William Tailboys nasceu aproximadamente 1416, em Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Walter Tailboys, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Alice Stafford, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Bonville antes novembro de 1446, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1461. Ele faleceu em 26 de maio de 1464, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 49 anos, e foi sepultado em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir William Tailboys родился около 1416 г. в местности Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Walter Tailboys было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Alice Stafford, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Bonville перед ноябрь 1446 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. В 1461 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 26 мая 1464 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 49 лет и был похоронен в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir William Tailboys nació aproximadamente 1416, en Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Walter Tailboys, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Alice Stafford, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Bonville antes de noviembre de 1446, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1461. Murió el 26 de mayo de 1464, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 49 años, y fue sepultado en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
